content:
I was not aware but testing_buildBlockV1 got merged https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/747
I thought that https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/710 was the active one 😅 

Have asked for the gas limit, ideally this would be discussed before the merge, but I guess I was on the wrong PR all the time 🙁
